summary: Rejection Report Filters - All features tested and verified. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - Dynamic batch dropdown filtering by SKU/Month/Year works correctly, Rejection Reason dropdown populated from master data, Apply and Clear buttons functional.

issues: Console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key' - duplicate React keys in rejection rows (minor, doesn't affect functionality)

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Duplicate React keys warning in rejection report rows - consider using unique composite keys

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and integrations verified

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data. Found 49 rejection rows, 4 rejection reasons (Black Particles, Bottle scratches, Cap Issues, White Particles), multiple SKUs and batches.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rejection Report Filters fully tested. Key features: 1) Dynamic Batch Dropdown - filteredBatches useMemo filters batches by filters.sku_id, filters.month, filters.year. When SKU selected, batch dropdown shows only batches for that SKU. When month/year changed, batch dropdown shows only batches with matching production_date. 2) Rejection Reason Filter - dropdown populated from GET /api/production/rejection-reasons master data. Filter value passed as query param to GET /api/production/rejection-report?rejection_reason=X. Backend filters rows case-insensitively. 3) Clear button resets all filters including rejection_reason. 4) data-testids: filter-month, filter-year, filter-sku, filter-batch, filter-stage-type, filter-resource, filter-rejection-reason, apply-filters-btn.

Backend_API_Tests.test_rejection_report_structure: PASSED - Response has rows, total_rejected, by_resource, by_date
Backend_API_Tests.test_rejection_reason_filter_works: PASSED - rejection_reason query param filters rows correctly
Backend_API_Tests.test_rejection_reason_filter_nonexistent: PASSED - Non-existent reason returns empty results
Backend_API_Tests.test_rejection_report_combined_filters: PASSED - Multiple filters can be combined
Backend_API_Tests.test_empty_rejection_reason_returns_all: PASSED - Empty filter returns all rows
